name: Hearthside Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples, then chop them.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
3. Grease and flour a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan.
4. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
5. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and add the milk, oil, and eggs.
6. Stir until thoroughly combined.
7. Gently stir in the chopped apples, cheddar cheese, and nuts.
8. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in the preheated oven until loaf is browned and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
9. Cool in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes.
10. Remove from the pan and cool to room temperature, on a wire rack, before slicing.
